title: Reuse a read-only or mutable zero Angle
prompt:
In Garry's Mod Lua, you need a zero Angle often in a hot path. It currently builds a new Angle(0, 0, 0) on every iteration. Show a faster approach for getting a zero Angle in that hot path. If the caller must mutate the angle, make sure your approach stays correct under mutation rather than corrupting a value shared elsewhere.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: read-only angle_zero or owned Angle:Zero() reuse
